module.name: agent
module.purpose: Agent crate namespace for model/session/task/prompt/step orchestration and the plan queue module. Prompt rendering includes ExecutionAnalysisPrompt, session step events route back to tasks, and task runtime maps execution signatures to step signatures so execution success can complete steps and trigger follow-up execution-analysis model plans.

childModules.name: model
childModules.purpose: Owns agent model backend traits, request/response data, backend errors, and the implemented Deepseek streaming backend. Internal backend implementations expose request directly instead of a send adapter.

childModules.name: plan
childModules.purpose: Owns PlanQueue, PlanRecord, and PlanError for insertion-ordered task plan storage, lookup, and completion tracking.

childModules.name: prompt
childModules.purpose: Defines the agent prompt interface, render_template rendering, InitialPrompt, and ExecutionAnalysisPrompt for execution-output analysis.

childModules.name: session
childModules.purpose: Owns Session startup/routing behavior, including forwarding Step events to clients and routing them back to the owning Task worker.

childModules.name: step
childModules.purpose: Owns the top-level agent runtime Step type re-exported by lib.rs and consumed by task runtime state and step execution helpers.

childModules.name: task
childModules.purpose: Owns task runtime state and step routing, including execution_map, plan-completion-gated complete handling, and execution-analysis follow-up plans.
